widgetData.source_sentence: “You know what charm is: a way of getting the answer yes without having asked any clear question.” [AUTHOR: Albert Camus,] [TAGS: none]
sentences: “Real generosity towards the future lies in giving all to the present.” [AUTHOR: Albert Camus,] [TAGS: none]

“If I had a world of my own, everything would be nonsense. Nothing would be what it is, because everything would be what it isn't. And contrary wise, what is, it wouldn't be. And what it wouldn't be, it would. You see?” [AUTHOR: Lewis Carroll,] [TAGS: none]
“I dream. Sometimes I think that's the only right thing to do.” [AUTHOR: Haruki Murakami,] [TAGS: none]

widgetData.source_sentence: “My name is Celaena Sardothien. But it makes no difference if my name's Celaena or Lillian or Bitch, because I'd still beat you, no matter what you call me.” [AUTHOR: Sarah J. Maas,] [TAGS: none]
sentences: “If you want to get laid, go to college. If you want an education, go to the library.” [AUTHOR: Frank Zappa] [TAGS: none]
“There are darknesses in life and there are lights, and you are one of the lights, the light of all lights.” [AUTHOR: Bram Stoker,] [TAGS: none]

“How long was I asleep?" she whispered. He didn't respond. "How long was I asleep?" she asked again, and noticed a hint of red in his cheeks. "You were asleep, too?" "Until you began drooling on my shoulder.” [AUTHOR: Sarah J. Maas,] [TAGS: none]

widgetData.source_sentence: “If A is a success in life, then A equals x plus y plus z. Work is x; y is play; and z is keeping your mouth shut” [AUTHOR: Albert Einstein] [TAGS: none]
sentences: “Don't be pushed around by the fears in your mind. Be led by the dreams in your heart.” [AUTHOR: Roy T. Bennett,] [TAGS: none]
“Shoot for the moon. Even if you miss, you'll land among the stars.” [AUTHOR: Norman Vincent Peale] [TAGS: none]
“Any fool can know. The point is to understand.” [AUTHOR: Albert Einstein] [TAGS: none]

widgetData.source_sentence: “I fell in love with her when we were together, then fell deeper in love with her in the years we were apart.” [AUTHOR: Nicholas Sparks,] [TAGS: none]
sentences: “My daddy said, that the first time you fall in love, it changes you forever and no matter how hard you try, that feeling just never goes away.” [AUTHOR: Nicholas Sparks,] [TAGS: none]
“You deal with mythological stuff for a few years, you learn that paradises are usually places where you get killed.” [AUTHOR: Rick Riordan,] [TAGS: none]

“Don't say you don't have enough time. You have exactly the same number of hours per day that were given to Helen Keller, Pasteur, Michelangelo, Mother Teresa, Leonardo da Vinci, Thomas Jefferson, and Albert Einstein.” [AUTHOR: H. Jackson Brown Jr.] [TAGS: none]

widgetData.source_sentence: “Wisdom comes from experience. Experience is often a result of lack of wisdom.” [AUTHOR: Terry Pratchett] [TAGS: none]
sentences: “Do not let the memories of your past limit the potential of your future. There are no limits to what you can achieve on your journey through life, except in your mind.” [AUTHOR: Roy T. Bennett,] [TAGS: none]
“Yesterday is gone. Tomorrow has not yet come. We have only today. Let us begin.” [AUTHOR: Mother Theresa] [TAGS: none]
“If you have enough book space, I don't want to talk to you.” [AUTHOR: Terry Pratchett] [TAGS: none]
